mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM Orders WHERE order_status = 'PAID'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM Orders WHERE order_status = 'PAID' AND DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Orders WHERE order_status = 'PAID'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Books WHERE stock <= 10 AND sale_status = 'ON_SALE'

SELECT CASE WHEN m.age BETWEEN 10 AND 19 THEN '10대' WHEN m.age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20대' WHEN m.age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30대' WHEN m.age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40대' WHEN m.age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50대' ELSE '기타' END AS ageGroup, m.gender AS gender, b.book_id AS bookId, b.title AS bookTitle, b.category AS category, SUM(oi.quantity) AS totalQuantitySold, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) AS totalSalesAmount FROM Orders o JOIN Members m ON o.member_id = m.member_id JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN Books b ON oi.book_id = b.book_id WHERE o.order_status = 'PAID' GROUP BY ageGroup, m.gender, b.book_id, b.title, b.category ORDER BY ageGroup ASC, m.gender ASC, totalQuantitySold DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS datePeriod, COUNT(order_id) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS salesAmount FROM Orders WHERE order_status = 'PAID' AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY datePeriod ASC
